merlin_thesis: Bullish bias at Extreme Premium — NAS100 at 30,490 holding above 30K ATH with clean HH/HL structure since May 19 SSL sweep (28,663). D1 dealing range is stale (price at 170.8% → extension territory), indicating powerful breakout. H4 shows tight range 30,284-30,656 with price at 55.4% premium. Yesterday's SSL sweep at 30,284 recovered immediately (classic ICT reversal pattern). June 1 daily candle was a tight doji (30,284-30,551, 3% body) suggesting consolidation before next move. Macro trend strongly bullish (+DI > -DI, ADX > 50). No high-impact news today. Risk-off signals emerging: BTC -4%, Gold +1.18% — watch for risk rotation. Premium position argues against chasing — wait for pullback into 30,200-30,300 support zone for long entries.
